headline: Dexter Lawrence trade: Bengals, Giants, NFL draft takeaways
description: The Giants traded Lawrence to the Bengals for the No. 10 pick in the draft. What does that say about the NFL's trade market, this draft class and the state of the Bengals?

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Kiper's pick predictions for Rounds 1-2
description: Mel Kiper Jr. predicts 64 picks across the first two rounds of the NFL draft, including two potential trades, a few QB landing spots and plenty of impact additions.

headline: 2026 NFL draft full order: AFC, NFC team picks in all rounds
description: The order for all seven rounds of the 2026 NFL draft is set, starting with the Raiders at No. 1 and ending with the Broncos at No. 257.

headline: Sources: Giants trade DT Lawrence to Bengals for No. 10 pick
description: The Giants are trading DT Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal for the No. 10 pick in next week's NFL draft, sources told ESPN.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New England Patriots updates, intel, buzz
description: The Patriots pick late in Round 1 and have 11 total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New England might do.

description: Check out some of the top highlights from Oklahoma's R Mason Thomas.

description: Check out some of the top highlights from South Carolina's Brandon Cisse.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest New York Giants updates, intel, buzz
description: The Giants pick early in Round 1 and have seven total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what New York might do.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Tennessee Titans updates, intel, buzz
description: The Titans pick early in Round 1 and have nine total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Tennessee might do.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Louis Riddick's favorite prospects, sleepers
description: Louis Riddick picks his guys in the 2026 class, including some offensive playmakers and ball-hawking defensive backs. See who's on his 10-player list.

headline: Texans looking to bolster roster, not fill holes, in draft
description: Houston has built its perennial playoff roster with same draft philosophy since coach DeMeco Ryans arrived in 2023.

headline: Titans feel draft ready with a 'cluster' of choices at No. 4
description: GM Mike Borgonzi knows that Tennessee will have many options when the Titans are on the clock at No. 4.

headline: Who won the Jaguars-Browns draft-day trade for Travis Hunter?
description: The Browns and Jags swapped picks in 2025 so Jacksonville could draft Hunter. Now, Cleveland has an extra first-rounder in 2026.

headline: Should the Giants take a RB in the top 5?
description: New York, with needs all over the roster, selects fifth Thursday when the NFL draft begins.

headline: Rams drop 'Thursday' 2026 NFL draft teaser featuring sons of 'Friday' stars
description: The short film inspired by the 1995 comedy "Friday" stars the sons of Ice Cube and Chris Tucker, joined by Rams players and celebrity cameos.

headline: 2026 NFL draft rankings: Matt Miller's top 481 players, comps
description: Matt Miller has finalized his rankings for the 2026 draft, listing his top 481 players and providing grades for each prospect.

headline: 2026 NFL draft rankings: Jordan Reid's top 499 prospects
description: Jordan Reid ranked every draftable player in the 2026 class and graded them by round. Here's his final list, plus scouting reports on the top names.

headline: Falcons trade DT Ruke Orhorhoro to Jaguars for DT Maason Smith
description: The Falcons have traded DT Ruke Orhorhoro to the Jaguars for DT Maason Smith. Both players were selected in the second round of the 2024 draft.
